test_cases.input_summary: Logistics brief for a two-person team reporting on migrant labour conditions in a Gulf state, with filming equipment
test_cases.notes: Safety framework was appropriately elevated for the press freedom context. Equipment import regulations were correctly flagged as a major risk. Digital security measures were well-detailed. Pre-departure checklist was sharp.

test_cases.input_summary: Logistics brief for a solo reporter covering a rural election in a Sub-Saharan African country, no filming equipment
test_cases.notes: Good adaptation to solo travel in a low-infrastructure environment. Health precautions were appropriate. Local fixer engagement was correctly prioritised. Check-in protocol was well-calibrated to the risk level.

test_cases.input_summary: Logistics brief for a three-person crew covering a climate conference in a European capital, routine travel
test_cases.notes: Appropriately scaled down the safety framework for low-risk travel. Conference accreditation and access logistics were well-covered. Equipment transport within the EU was correctly noted as straightforward. Pre-departure list was practical.
